allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); pkgs=d.get\('packages',{}\); print\('Node version required:', d.get\('nodeVersion','not set'\)\); print\('Lock file version:', d.get\('lockfileVersion','not set'\)\); print\('fast-xml-parser version:', pkgs.get\('node_modules/fast-xml-parser',{}\).get\('version','not found'\)\)")
